query: SELECT id, contactName, contactPhone, callType, status, classification, callTimestamp, duration, teamMemberName, recordingUrl, transcript FROM calls WHERE status IN ('pending', 'transcribing', 'classifying', 'grading') ORDER BY callTimestamp DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT id, contactName, contactPhone, callType, status, classification, callTimestamp, duration, teamMemberName, recordingUrl, transcript FROM calls WHERE status IN ('pending', 'transcribing', 'classifying', 'grading') ORDER BY callTimestamp DESC;

rows.transcript: Hello Yes, I was looking for mr. Adronimous What can I do for you? This is a Daniel Shannon my partner mentioned I believe you had filled out a web form about being interested in selling your place on the armadillo court 1601 Yeah, but I'm I got a realtor already Responding here and I thought it was gonna tell me value of the house. Oh, okay understood Yeah, I pulled it up online and just kind of wanted to double-check a couple of details on it Um, is the game plan definitely going to be the listed or would you consider a cash offer on it as well? well, I'd say I heard cash offers too low and Always fine print that says I have to list it with you guys. You should give me an offer. Oh Okay, understood. Yeah, just kind of being transparent. Usually us as investors We focus a bit more on houses that might need a bit of work and this one honestly looks like it's in great condition I do think maybe listing it would be the best option for you to net the most money in your pocket I'm really from an investment standpoint Usually what we do is if we don't have any information on it We kind of base it off of the tax assessment and recent sales and we kind of go off of that But it really would depend on what the investor would be doing what you're describing is more so more so wholesaling it Which would basically be just getting it under contract and listing it to other investors And if that's something you'd consider, I mean I know with the team No, but hey, I appreciate the call back. No problem. Appreciate your time. Yes. Thank you

Hello. Hey, Jack. It's Kyle Barks. How are you doing? This is Kyle Barks. We spoke a few weeks back about your property on Hackberry Lane. I just wanted to see if you ended up getting that one sold. No, I haven't. I'm currently working on it. I'm just going to refinance it and use it for rental property, I guess. Nobody will offer me what it's worth or even close to what it's worth. I gotcha. Did you end up getting that other property on the MLS over by the lake? No, it went pending on us before I could get anything squared away, so that's what I'm working on now. I'm going to do the refinance and bank the money and wait until we find what we want. I gotcha. Makes sense. Has something changed? I know we were at $165,000. It sounded like that was far too low for you. It sounded like the $236,000 was the number you needed. I'm just trying to get that. The market may get hot again and it'd be worth more than that. Gotcha. You never know. Hi, Aaron. I just wanted to check in with you. If you don't mind, I could give you a call maybe in a few months here and see if we can connect and see if something changes. That'll be fine. Sounds good, Jack. I appreciate you. Thank you. Bye. Bye.

Hello? Hey, Zella. It's Kyle. How are you doing? Good, thank you. Good to hear. I just wanted to give you a quick call. Everything's good on our end. We're lining up closing for the 27th of February. Let me see what day of the week that is. That's going to be, so that's two Fridays from today. Okay. So everything looks good for that. The last thing that we need to send over to the title company is just an addendum that clears up the picture of the assessment. Basically, they just want something that clearly states that buyer's paying for closing costs and seller's going to be paying any outstanding HOA fees assessments. It looks like there's nothing out there right now, but they just need it on paper. So I was going to send that addendum over to you. Same thing, it's on DocHub. If you can have your mom sign and you sign it and get it back to me, I can pass it over to the title company and make sure everything's lined up and ready to go for the 27th. Okay, yeah, that's great. Yeah, I will do that. Okay, sounds good. I'm about to send it over here in a minute. Okay, all right. Okay, sounds good. I appreciate you all. Any fun plans this Friday night or just hanging loose? Oh, not yet. Gotcha. I hear you. Good deal. Are you in Nashville or you're somewhere else? Oh, yeah, I'm here in Nashville. Okay. Yeah, I'm over by the fairgrounds. Oh, okay. It's like south side of the city. Okay. Yeah. All right. All right. Sounds good. I appreciate you. I'll get it sent over here to you now. Okay. Okay. Thank you. Thank you. Yep. Bye-bye. Bye-bye.
